fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the start date of the period defined on the line for the summary of the bank account balance.

fields.name: Net Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net value of entries for the period shown in the left column.

fields.name: Net Change (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net value of entries in LCY for the period shown in the left column.
